description: SRAM AXS CLI for bikes, components, registrations, ride activities, and synced component-summary analytics.

tools.name: account_accessgroups
tools.description: Get your public access groups. Returns array of AccessGroup.

tools.name: account_export
tools.description: Request a data export of your account. Returns the new User.

tools.name: account_flags
tools.description: Get your account feature flags. Returns the Flags.

tools.name: account_profile
tools.description: Get the authenticated SRAM AXS account profile, including rider identity fields and account metadata returned by the profile endpoint. Returns the User.

tools.name: activities_list
tools.description: List your ride activities. Optional: page (default: 1), page-size (default: 50). Returns array of Activity.

tools.name: activities_types
tools.description: List SRAM AXS activity type definitions used to classify synced ride activities and telemetry summaries. Returns array of ActivityType.

tools.name: bikes_get
tools.description: Get a bike by ID. Required: id. Returns the Bike.

tools.name: bikes_list
tools.description: List your registered bikes. Returns array of Bike.

tools.name: components_get
tools.description: Get a component by ID. Required: id. Returns the Component.

tools.name: components_list
tools.description: List your AXS components. Returns array of Component.

tools.name: devicetypes_list
tools.description: List all AXS device types. Returns array of DeviceType. (public)

tools.name: linkedids_list
tools.description: List your linked third-party accounts. Returns array of LinkedID.

tools.name: linkedids_unlink
tools.description: Unlink a connected third-party account, such as a Strava integration, by linked account ID. Required: id. Destructive.

tools.name: models_list
tools.description: List component models and latest firmware versions. Returns array of Model.

tools.name: notifications_list
tools.description: List SRAM AXS account notifications for the authenticated rider, including notification IDs, titles, bodies, and timestamps when available. Returns array of Notification.

tools.name: products_get
tools.description: Get product detail by product ID. Required: id. Returns the Product.

tools.name: registrations_create
tools.description: Register a component to your account by serial number. Required: serial. Optional: email. Returns the new Component.

params.name: serial
params.description: Component serial number (printed on the component)

params.name: email
params.description: Account email (defaults to the authenticated user)

tools.name: stats_get
tools.description: Get your aggregate riding stats. Returns the Stats.

tools.name: summaries_activities
tools.description: List per-activity summaries. Optional: page (default: 1), page-size (default: 50). Returns array of ActivitySummary.

tools.name: summaries_components
tools.description: List component usage summaries (wear, shift counts, distance). Returns array of ComponentSummary.

tools.name: units_list
tools.description: List advanced measurement units. Optional: page (default: 1), page-size (default: 100). Returns array of Unit.
